candidate_llm_application: LLM authorship via letter-form topology: each model's writing-style has topological signature (token-bigram graphs, loop counts in attention); model identification via signature.

results.title: Model Attribution / Stylometric Watermarking: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on model attribution / stylometric watermarking, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
